title: Infinite Restocks│無限補貨
description: Just like the old version, the number of restocks will not be limited to 2 times.│就像舊版一樣，補貨次數不會限制在2次內。
body:
# Function│功能
Villagers will work to restock as long as they are out of stock, and will not stop restocking just because they have already restocked twice that day.│村民只要缺貨就會進行工作來補貨，而不會因為當天已經補貨了兩次而不再進行補貨。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
